'''Yount''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] posted on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Wakeelmui]], whose duties included being in charge of a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] on the world. At some point prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]<ref name="CCG" /> in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="New Essential Chronology">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].</ref> Yount recommended stormtrooper [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Wallen]] and his unit to [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Igar/Legends|Igar]],<ref name="CCG" /> the [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]] in charge of<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|80|Igar, Commander}}</ref> [[Tempest Force/Legends|Tempest Force]], the [[Imperial Military/Legends|military]] [[Legion/Legends|legion]] stationed on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]].<ref name="Tempest Force CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|230|Tempest Force}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Yount was briefly mentioned on Wallen's character card for the [[1999]] ''[[Endor Limited]]'' expansion set of [[Decipher]]'s [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="CCG" /> As the name "Wakeelmui" is an anagram of the [[Wikipedia:United States|United States]] city of [[Wikipedia:Milwaukee|Milwaukee]], Yount's surname is shared with that of [[Wikipedia:Milwaukee Brewers|Milwaukee Brewers]] [[Wikipedia:National Baseball Hall of Fame and Museum|Hall of Famer]] [[Wikipedia:Robin Yount|Robin Yount]].<ref name="Robin Yount">{{WebCite|url=http://www.baseball-almanac.com/players/player.php?p=yountro01|text=Robin Yount Baseball Stats by Baseball Almanac|work=Baseball Almanac|archivedate=20171028041747}}</ref>
